contractor_tax_save_run.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO dbo.contractor_tax_runs (run_id, profile_name, match_rate, inferred, monolith_root, rebuild_root, status, detected_document_types_json, completed_at, payload_json) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, %s) RETURNING run_id
contractor_tax_save_run.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO dbo.contractor_tax_runs (run_id, profile_name, match_rate, inferred, monolith_root, rebuild_root, status, detected_document_types_json, completed_at, payload_json) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSUTCDATETIME(), ?);

contractor_tax_apply_review_decision.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO dbo.contractor_tax_review_actions (review_action_id, operation_id, run_id, contractor_name, document_type, tax_year, previous_status, new_status, reviewed_by, notes, reviewed_at) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) RETURNING review_action_id
contractor_tax_apply_review_decision.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO dbo.contractor_tax_review_actions (review_action_id, operation_id, run_id, contractor_name, document_type, tax_year, previous_status, new_status, reviewed_by, notes, reviewed_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSUTCDATETIME());

contractor_tax_load_pending_operations.postgresqlSql: SELECT operation_id, contractor_name, document_type, tax_year, source_path, target_path, status, reason FROM dbo.contractor_tax_rebuild_operations WHERE run_id = %s AND status = 'pending-review' ORDER BY contractor_name, document_type, tax_year
contractor_tax_load_pending_operations.sqlServerSql: SELECT operation_id, contractor_name, document_type, tax_year, source_path, target_path, status, reason FROM dbo.contractor_tax_rebuild_operations WHERE run_id = ? AND status = 'pending-review' ORDER BY contractor_name, document_type, tax_year
